summary: This brief post serves as a reading list for UI patterns resources. Fowler notes that his UI patterns work from 2006 has been dormant while he focuses on Domain Specific Languages. He recommends Jeremy Miller's series on UI design in C# and Derek Greer's survey of MVC/MVP architecture history.
key_points: Fowler's UI patterns work has been on hold since 2006 as his focus shifted to DSLs
Jeremy Miller wrote an excellent series on UI design patterns in C#
Derek Greer provides a useful historical survey of MVC/MVP architectures
money_quotes: Since then they've been very much on ice as my primary writing focus has shifted (although not very visibly) to DomainSpecificLanguages.
key_insight: Even prolific writers must prioritize, and curating quality resources from others helps a community while major works incubate.
